table-207-207.caption: What are the paragraph texts for the document with the name 'Customer reviews'?
data: This document analyzes customer reviews for our product.
We collected reviews from various online platforms.
Overall, customers seem satisfied with the product's performance.
However, some users reported issues with the product's durability.
We are working on addressing these concerns in future versions.
